Result.Name: Inspection Hold
Result.HoldReason: Prevents a permit inspection from being scheduled on any permits (master or sub) when this type of hold is placed on the record.
Result.Comments: 30-day letter sent to property owner. Permit expired for no activity per N.C. General Statue "§ 160D-1111. No work authorized by any building permit that has expired shall be performed until a new permit has been secured.
